layman_headline: Fear grips the crypto market — patience is the smartest play right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a fearful state with most altcoins bleeding while Bitcoin holds relatively steady. None of the coins on our watchlist present a clean, high-conviction setup. Several coins like ZRO and TRUMP are approaching oversold territory, but their charts are still in clear downtrends with bearish structure, meaning they could fall further before bouncing. We're better off waiting for a confirmed reversal signal rather than catching a falling knife.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is scared and altcoins are weak. A better entry with stronger confirmation signals will likely appear within the next few days as fear reaches extreme levels or a catalyst emerges.
expert_reasoning: I evaluated all 9 candidates and found no setup meeting the criteria for a high-confidence swing entry. ZRO and TRUMP both have low RSI readings (31 and 29 respectively) suggesting oversold conditions, but both carry bearish chart bias scores (-0.70) with price below all major moving averages. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) with a bullish marubozu candle, but the risk/reward to nearest resistance is only 0.11x — terrible asymmetry. BTC dominance at 56.2% continues to pressure altcoins broadly. The Fear & Greed index at 26 is improving from 23, which is a reliable signal historically (80% win rate), but it hasn't reached extreme fear levels that would signal a strong contrarian entry. Without a volume breakout (our most reliable signal at 100% win rate) or a clear news catalyst, the prudent move is to remain in hunting mode.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.2% continues to drain capital from altcoins — alt positions face structural headwind
Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but hasn't reached extreme fear (<15) where the strongest bounce setups emerge
No volume breakout signals detected on any candidate — our highest-conviction signal type is absent
watch_list: ZRO holding $0.90 support — a bullish engulfing candle here with volume would trigger a buy
Fear & Greed index trend — if it drops below 20 or spikes above 35, both are actionable signals
ETHFI momentum — if it clears $0.43 resistance with volume, the bullish chart structure becomes a valid breakout trade
market_context: Bitcoin is consolidating around $64,300 with modest gains while altcoins broadly underperform. The market is in a fear state (26/100) with high BTC dominance (56.2%), creating a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades.
context_banner: Market fear is improving but hasn't reached capitulation — disciplined patience in hunting mode while monitoring oversold altcoins at key support levels.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear), improving from 23 — historically reliable (80% win rate) but not yet at extreme levels that produce the best mean-reversion entries.
ZRO RSI at 31 and TRUMP RSI at 29 are near oversold territory, but both charts show bearish structure with price below all moving averages — no confirmation of reversal yet.
Bitcoin described as 'nearing late stages of bear market' by Jamie Coutts, suggesting macro bottoming process is underway but not yet complete for alts.
No volume breakout detected on any candidate — our most reliable signal (100% win rate, +13.4% avg return) is completely absent this cycle.
ETH derivatives reset noted alongside positive DePIN/gaming narrative — potential sector rotation could benefit ETHFI if ETH ecosystem momentum builds.
